records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no... Am I really being pushed back... by her?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no... Am I really being pushed back... by her?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no... Am I really being pushed back... by her?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is ridiculous! This can't be real...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is ridiculous! This can't be real...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is ridiculous! This can't be real...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I still don't fully understand the weight of the vows each of you all have carried.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I still don't fully understand the weight of the vows each of you all have carried.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I still don't fully understand the weight of the vows each of you all have carried.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or what true justice I should be pursuing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or what true justice I should be pursuing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or what true justice I should be pursuing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know what kind of resolve it takes to wield a <color=#ffd34c>sword</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know what kind of resolve it takes to wield a <color=#ffd34c>sword</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know what kind of resolve it takes to wield a <color=#ffd34c>sword</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you know what it truly means to pursue <color=#ffd34c>chivalry</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you know what it truly means to pursue <color=#ffd34c>chivalry</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you know what it truly means to pursue <color=#ffd34c>chivalry</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn you! Stop acting like you've become something!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn you! Stop acting like you've become something!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn you! Stop acting like you've become something!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're just a knockoff of your predecessor, clinging to borrowed power!94p94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're just a knockoff of your predecessor, clinging to borrowed power!94p94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're just a knockoff of your predecessor, clinging to borrowed power!94p94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what you all saw in me, someone who only ever failed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what you all saw in me, someone who only ever failed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what you all saw in me, someone who only ever failed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't even protect you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't even protect you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't even protect you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no need for self-blame, Esther.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no need for self-blame, Esther.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no need for self-blame, Esther.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The knights who fell here became <color=#ffd34c>shields</color> for the future of those who survived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The knights who fell here became <color=#ffd34c>shields</color> for the future of those who survived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The knights who fell here became <color=#ffd34c>shields</color> for the future of those who survived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You, who only chased strength and have never carried anything, will never understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You, who only chased strength and have never carried anything, will never understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You, who only chased strength and have never carried anything, will never understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How heavy the burden is for those who must rise again, even after being trampled countless times.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How heavy the burden is for those who must rise again, even after being trampled countless times.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How heavy the burden is for those who must rise again, even after being trampled countless times.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The terror of having to march forward without even the chance to look back...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The terror of having to march forward without even the chance to look back...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The terror of having to march forward without even the chance to look back...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How we had to name that burden "hope" and what resolve we fought with...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How we had to name that burden "hope" and what resolve we fought with...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How we had to name that burden "hope" and what resolve we fought with...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nonsense! Pathetic drivel from failures...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nonsense! Pathetic drivel from failures...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nonsense! Pathetic drivel from failures...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It means nothing in the real world!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It means nothing in the real world!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It means nothing in the real world!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. The starlight they left behind still shines here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. The starlight they left behind still shines here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. The starlight they left behind still shines here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that is where you lost, Carantisir.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that is where you lost, Carantisir.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that is where you lost, Carantisir.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, if I have the right to move forward...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, if I have the right to move forward...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, if I have the right to move forward...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then please, lend me your strength.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then please, lend me your strength.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then please, lend me your strength.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't break your stance. A knight never lets any part of their body go to waste.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't break your stance. A knight never lets any part of their body go to waste.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't break your stance. A knight never lets any part of their body go to waste.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An Armament is only a conduit to channel power. What truly matters is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: An Armament is only a conduit to channel power. What truly matters is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: An Armament is only a conduit to channel power. What truly matters is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How you wield the <color=#ffd34c>starlight</color> within.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How you wield the <color=#ffd34c>starlight</color> within.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How you wield the <color=#ffd34c>starlight</color> within.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I, Esterosa de Chevalier, Knight of Virgo, ask you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I, Esterosa de Chevalier, Knight of Virgo, ask you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I, Esterosa de Chevalier, Knight of Virgo, ask you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you fight for?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you fight for?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you fight for?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does your so-called justice...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does your so-called justice...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does your so-called justice...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surpass the pride of our knighthood?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surpass the pride of our knighthood?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surpass the pride of our knighthood?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So in the end... you still stand in my way?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So in the end... you still stand in my way?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So in the end... you still stand in my way?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. The one who will defeat you is no Chevalier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. The one who will defeat you is no Chevalier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. The one who will defeat you is no Chevalier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's me... <color=#ffd34c>We</color> will bring you down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's me... <color=#ffd34c>We</color> will bring you down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's me... <color=#ffd34c>We</color> will bring you down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This ends here, Carantisir!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This ends here, Carantisir!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This ends here, Carantisir!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You and me. Blue Shift or Red Shift...

records.m_Talk_FRA: You and me. Blue Shift or Red Shift...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see whose justice truly stands!!
